message:
deps: bump ctrlc 3.4 -> 3.5.2

Minor bump within 3.x. 3.5 added improved Windows handler support and
reentrancy fixes; Unix path used by FrankenFS is unchanged.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ bitflags = "2.11.1"
 blake3 = "1.8.4"
 clap = { version = "4.6.1", features = ["derive"] }
 crc32c = "0.6.8"
-ctrlc = "3.4"
+ctrlc = "3.5.2"
 criterion = { version = "0.5.1", features = ["html_reports"] }
 crossbeam-epoch = "0.9.18"
 hex = "0.4.3"
